## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run compile` builds cleanly with no new type errors.
- [ ] I tested the change in the Extension Development Host (F5).
- [ ] I updated the README(s) / docs if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, personal emails, or account data are included in the code, commits, or screenshots.
- [ ] The change respects the security boundary: the extension never reads, stores, or transmits Claude account credentials.
